Spoofing.description: Critical CORS vulnerability. Server allows requests from ANY origin (*). This enables cross-site attacks and data theft.
Spoofing.mitigation: Restrict CORS to specific trusted origins.

Spoofing.description: JWT token validation vulnerability. Tampered token accepted. Signature not properly verified.
Spoofing.evidence: Tampered token accepted without proper validation.
Spoofing.mitigation: Ensure proper signature verification for JWT tokens.

Spoofing.description: Session fixation vulnerability detected. Session ID not regenerated after authentication.
Spoofing.evidence: Same session ID used before and after login.
Spoofing.mitigation: Regenerate session ID upon successful login.

Tampering.description: SQL injection successful using payload. Response indicates successful authentication.
Tampering.evidence: Response contains 'success' or 'token' after injection payload.
Tampering.mitigation: Use prepared statements and parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

Tampering.description: XSS vulnerability detected. Payload reflected in response without proper encoding.
Tampering.mitigation: Sanitize and encode user inputs to prevent XSS.

InformationDisclosure.description: Information leakage detected. Different responses allow user enumeration.
InformationDisclosure.evidence: Invalid user response differs from valid user response.
InformationDisclosure.mitigation: Ensure consistent responses for valid and invalid usernames.

InformationDisclosure.description: Missing security headers increase risk of attacks.
InformationDisclosure.mitigation: Implement essential security headers in HTTP responses.

InformationDisclosure.description: Path traversal vulnerability detected. System files accessible.
InformationDisclosure.mitigation: Validate and sanitize file paths to prevent path traversal.

DenialOfService.description: Rate limiting detected. Blocked after multiple attempts.
DenialOfService.evidence: Response indicates rate limiting after several login attempts.
DenialOfService.mitigation: Implement account lockout mechanisms and rate limiting.

ElevationOfPrivilege.description: Weak password policy detected. Weak passwords accepted.
ElevationOfPrivilege.mitigation: Enforce strong password policies requiring complexity.

combined_threats.mitigation: Restrict CORS to specific trusted origins.
